fireworks.title: Fireworks Superplugin Settings
fireworks.subtitle: GPU-Accelerated Fireworks Effects

toaster_mode.title: 🍞 Toaster Mode (Low-End PCs)
toaster_mode.description: Uses Canvas 2D rendering instead of WebGL for maximum compatibility
toaster_mode.help: Optimized for weak systems and maximum compatibility
toaster_mode.tip: Use Toaster Mode if your PC slows down during fireworks or if you experience rendering issues in OBS.

fireworks.performance_info: Ces paramètres protègent contre les freezes lors de nombreux événements simultanés. Valeurs plus basses = plus de stabilité.
fireworks.frame_skip_info: Frame Skip s'active quand les FPS tombent sous cette valeur
